title: Fields, Variables, or Watches
text: Fields, Variables, or Watches Change the value of a field, variable, or watch expression. Specify a new value for the field, variable or watch. Then click Apply or Close . Field, Variable, or Watch fields Displays the name of the field, variable, or watch value to edit. This is a read-only field. Expression and Value Expression —name of the field, variable, or watch value to edit. This is a read-only field. Value —current value of the field, variable, or watch and allows you to edit it. Buttons Apply —applies a change to a value. Close —applies any changes and exits the form. Editing To edit the fields, refer to Updating fields, variables, or watch values . Related Links Working with watches Add watches from the debugger main window or from the browser. Browsing ProcScript Modules in the Uniface Debugger Navigate to specific ProcScript modules in components or global ProcScript using the Debugger Browser, and use the browser to set breakpoints and watches.
